title: Service Manifest
description: Schema for services/<name>/service.yml. Each file is the single source of truth for one service family — what previously lived split across docker-compose.yml, .env.example, and bootstrapper/service-configs.yml.

virtual.description: If true, this manifest has no compose fragment. Used for logical groupings like cloud-providers (routed through LiteLLM, no container of their own). Virtual manifests MAY omit `containers` and MUST NOT have a services/<name>/compose.yml.

name.description: Folder name under services/. Must match the parent directory name. Kebab-case.

label.description: Human-readable label shown in the TUI wizard.

category.description: Wizard grouping. data=DB/cache/storage; llm=LLM gateway/engine; ai=vector/STT/TTS/image-gen/doc; app=user-facing service; infra=gateway/observability.

containers.description: Every container name in this family's compose.yml. The manifest_validator asserts this matches compose.yml's services keys 1:1. May be empty when `virtual: true`.

var.description: Env var name that holds the image reference (interpolated as ${VAR} in compose.yml).

container.description: Which container in this manifest uses this image. Must appear in `containers`.

sources.description: Optional SOURCE-variant block. Omit for services without source variation (e.g. redis, kong).

default.description: Default source id. Must match one of options[].id.

requires.description: Env vars that MUST be non-empty when this source is selected (e.g. LLM_PROVIDER_EXTERNAL_URL for ollama-external).

effects.description: Env vars this source assigns when active. Values may be literal scalars or ${VAR}-references resolved after all manifests load.

name.description: UPPER_SNAKE_CASE env var name. Must be globally unique across all manifests.

default.description: Default value emitted into .env.example. Scalar only.

auto_managed.description: If true, the variable is computed at runtime (by source effects or a hook) and is NOT emitted into .env.example with a default. Still documented.

secret.description: If true, treated as sensitive (.env.example default is empty; never logged in plain text).

required.description: Other service-manifest names this one CANNOT run without. Logical dependency — compose-level depends_on still lives in compose.yml.

name.description: Env var this manifest produces and other services read.

consumers.description: Service-manifest names that consume the exported value.

exports.description: Documents the cross-service env-var contract. Validator asserts each exported name appears in this manifest's env declarations (or is produced by source effects).

hook.description: Dotted Python module path (e.g. 'services.hooks.comfyui') for a callable that runs AFTER declarative effects and may mutate auto_managed env vars.

runtime_sc.description: Slice of the bootstrapper's legacy service-configs.yml `source_configurable:` block, owned by this manifest. The sc_synthesizer concatenates these blocks across manifests to produce the runtime config dict the bootstrapper consumes.

runtime_adaptive.description: Slice of the legacy service-configs.yml `adaptive_services:` block. Same synthesizer pipeline.

runtime_deps.description: Slice of the legacy service-configs.yml `service_dependencies:` block.

runtime_dependency_tiers.description: Globals-only. Stack-wide tier ordering (data_tier, init_tier, core_services, app_tier).
